field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '结算单', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'validation_status', 'name', 'settlement_flow_label', 'settlement_type', 'business_category_id', 'document_date', 'date_settlement']}, {'title': '项目与合同', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'operation_strategy', 'contract_id', 'partner_id', 'settlement_unit_id', 'company_id', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '结算分类与周期', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['title', 'settlement_category_id', 'settlement_category_display', 'settlement_stage_id', 'planned_settlement_date', 'declared_date', 'final_approved_date', 'approved_date', 'settlement_period_start', 'settlement_period_end']}, {'title': '结算金额与明细', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['settlement_amount', 'amount_total', 'submitted_amount', 'approved_amount', 'deduction_amount', 'adjustment_total', 'amount_after_adjustment', 'line_ids']}, {'title': '收付执行', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['requested_fund_amount', 'paid_amount', 'remaining_amount', 'amount_paid', 'unpaid_amount', 'amount_payable', 'payment_request_ids', 'payment_request_line_ids']}, {'title': '发票与采购关联', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['invoice_ref', 'invoice_date', 'invoice_amount', 'purchase_order_ids']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['settlement_description', 'note', 'attachment_ids', 'attachment_count']}, {'title': '匹配与调整', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['compliance_state', 'compliance_message', 'adjustment_ids', 'reject_reason']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 90, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_fact_model', 'legacy_fact_id', 'legacy_fact_type', 'legacy_document_state', 'legacy_contract_no', 'legacy_counterparty_name', 'source_created_by', 'source_created_at', 'entry_user_id', 'entry_data']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'validation_status', 'sequence': 20, 'group_title': '办理主信息', 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'name', 'sequence': 30, 'group_title': '办理主信息'}, {'name': 'settlement_flow_label',
